feed.title: SAP Community - SAP BTP, ABAP environment
feed.subtitle: SAP BTP, ABAP environment Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: CDS view entity giving annotation error
entry.content:
I created a simple CDS view entity and for unknown reasons, it is giving me annotation errors such as 'Annotation 'AbapCatalog.viewEnhancementCategory' used at wrong position (wrong scope)'.

So, I created another CDS view entity with a different name (but in the same package) and exactly the same query, and it activated without any errors.

I have attached a screenshot of the two CDS view entities below:

Kindly help in resolving this weird issue.

entry.title: pessimistic lock in custom RAP based application(OData V2)
entry.content:
Hi,

We want to implement pessimistic lock in one of the custom RAP based application(OData V2) where if user A is editing the document & if at the same time user B is trying to edit the same document then system should give error as "The document is currently being processed by user". 

User do not want to use optimistic lock, which lets user to go in edit mode and at the time of save system will checks the lock.

The similar functionality is already achieved in one of the standard Fiori app -- App ID
F3893 (Manage Sales Orders - Version 2) it is using pessimistic lock.

When user click on Edit button on object page, call goes to backend to check sales order is already locked or not. if it is locked then system is giving popup with error as it is already locked. However not able to understand how this is integrated into this particular app.

If anyone have any idea about this, appreciate your help in this.

entry.title: Best practice for converting FLAT file to XML in CPI
entry.content:
Hello, I'm a newc to this community, and I need to convert a flat file (like the example provided below) into XML format in CPI. I've found various blogs that suggest using Groovy scripts, while others recommend a combination of Palette functions and Groovy scripts. I'm unsure about the best practice to follow in CPI for handling this kind of scenario.

Looking for assistance from the community to meet this requirement using the best practices in CPI. Any assistance would be highly appreciated.

Thanks!

entry.title: List Report Chart Does Not Display When Sorting - RAP
entry.content:
Hi experts,

I'm encountering an issue with sorting fields for Dynamic measures, which are created using Annotation XML in BAS through Aggregation.ApplySupported. It appears that I might not be able to use this field for sorting purposes. Am I missing something, or is it not possible to sort by this field? Could you possibly provide me with a solution or point me towards relevant documentation?  Below are images of my error.

Thanks a lot.

Chart annotation

 

without sort

adding sort field (Dynamic measures)

List data is ok but Chart not display and I got error request (cause using orderby "CountRecordSum" this field is Dynamic Measures created on BAS)

entry.title: Count Top Skip are not supported in Odata Query of RAP service binding
entry.content:
Hi, RAP Expert,

I run into failure in the first query. Would you please help me on this how to resolve it ?

 

REQUEST

I tried annotation with ObjectModel.query.implementedBy:'ABAP:ZCL_FO_QUEQRY' and the code is in the following box. But it doesn't resolve the issue .

CLASS zcl_fo_queqry DEFINITION
  PUBLIC
  FINAL
  CREATE PUBLIC .

  PUBLIC SECTION.

    INTERFACES if_rap_query_provider .
  PROTECTED SECTION.
  PRIVATE SECTION.
ENDCLASS.



CLASS zcl_fo_queqry IMPLEMENTATION.


  METHOD if_rap_query_provider~select.

              DATA(lv_offset) = io_request->get_paging( )->get_offset( ).
              DATA(lv_page_size) = io_request->get_paging( )->get_page_size( ).
              DATA(lv_max_rows) = COND #( WHEN lv_page_size = if_rap_query_paging=>page_size_unlimited
                                          THEN 0 ELSE lv_page_size ).
              DATA(lt_req_elements) = io_request->get_requested_elements( ).
              DATA(lv_req_elements)  = concat_lines_of( table = lt_req_elements sep = `, ` ).
              DATA(lv_sql_filter) = io_request->get_filter( )->get_as_sql_string( ).

  TRY.


  CASE io_request->get_entity_id( ).
  WHEN 'ZR_FORDER_ITEMS' .

              IF io_request->is_data_requested( ).

              DATA lt_fo_items_response TYPE STANDARD TABLE OF ZR_FORDER_ITEMS.
               SELECT (lv_req_elements) FROM ZR_Forder_ITEMS
               WHERE (lv_sql_filter)
               ORDER BY transportation_order_item
               INTO CORRESPONDING FIELDS OF TABLE @LT_fo_items_response
               OFFSET @LV_offset UP TO @LV_max_rows ROWS.
               io_response->set_data( it_data = lt_fo_items_response  ).
*               CATCH cx_rap_query_response_set_twic.

             ENDIF .

           IF io_request->is_total_numb_of_rec_requested( ).
**select count
              SELECT COUNT( * ) FROM ZR_FORDER_ITEMS
                                WHERE (lv_sql_filter)
                                INTO @DATA(lv_count).
**fill response
              io_response->set_total_number_of_records( lv_count ).
            ENDIF.

  WHEN 'ZR_FREIGHTORDER' .
  IF io_request->is_data_requested( ).

              DATA lt_fo_headers_response TYPE STANDARD TABLE OF ZR_FREIGHTORDER.

               SELECT (lv_req_elements) FROM ZR_FREIGHTORDER
               WHERE (lv_sql_filter)
               ORDER BY transportationorder
               INTO CORRESPONDING FIELDS OF TABLE @LT_fo_headers_response
               OFFSET @LV_offset UP TO @LV_max_rows ROWS.

               io_response->set_data( it_data = lt_fo_headers_response  ).



  ENDIF.

             IF io_request->is_total_numb_of_rec_requested( ).
**select count
              SELECT COUNT( * ) FROM ZR_FREIGHTORDER
                                WHERE (lv_sql_filter)
                                INTO @DATA(lv_count1).
**fill response
              io_response->set_total_number_of_records( lv_count1 ).
            ENDIF.

  ENDCASE.

        CATCH cx_root INTO DATA(exception).
        DATA(exception_message) = cl_message_helper=>get_latest_t100_exception( exception )->if_message~get_longtext( ).

  ENDTRY.
  ENDMETHOD.
ENDCLASS.

Best Regards!

Jacky Liu

entry.title: Is there a way to submit a controlling object into BAPI_ASSET_ACQUISITION_POST?
entry.content:
How do I submit a profit center against the offsetting account when using the function module BAPI_ASSET_ACQUISITION_POST (no fields in the submitted structures/tables).

The offsetting account I am posting to requires a controlling object and the error KI235 is returned (Account nnnnn requires an assignment to a CO object).

Is this possible?

entry.title: question, is there any medical management module integrated to SAP Employee central or SAP BTP?
entry.content:
Hello experts, we would like to know if there is a module where you can manage medical appointments, medication control, etc. at medical office level for an industry.
Not an independent medical center or hospital, but a small internal clinic within an industry.

Is there any solution that integrates to EMPLOYEE CENTRAL or any application already made in sap BTP or SAP independent module.

I would appreciate your comments

entry.title: RAP unmanaged entity in a managed behavior definition
entry.content:
Hi everyone,

I'm trying to include an existing BDEF into another.

I'm trying to create a generic Address object that I can use in multiple BOs:

The /RHP/R_Address has its behavior definition, I'd like to link it from /RHP/R_Location.

I could create an unmanaged association so I could create from the Location entity

unmanaged association _Address { create ( features : global ); with draft; }

In the corresponding methods, I read and create from the Location entity.

The problem with this approach is that the Service Binding doesn't support unmanaged draft

And if I remove the draft option I've got another error in the Maintenance Object

I also tried specifying it as a foreign entity, but it only works to include the entity in the results (failed, mapping)

foreign entity /RHP/R_Address alias Address;

Another option I'd like to test is to create an unmanaged entity (/RHP/R_LocationAddress) inside /RHP/R_Location so I can redefine create, update, and delete methods to call internally /RHP/R_Address by EML.

Can someone help me to manage the /RHP/R_Address from /RHP/R_Location?

Thank you in advance!

entry.title: Re: SAP CPI - UDF Mapping Context Issue
entry.content:
Hi Dinu,

Thank you for the reply,

When i tested with your code I am getting a different result, please see the screen shot

First context should repeat it self based on second input count number

if count value in second context is 1 then repeat 1 time

if count value in second context is 5 then repeat 5 times

if count value in second context is 3 then repeat 3 times

Thanks

entry.title: How to read TR versions?
entry.content:
Hello experts,

Pl. help us in understanding the below pic, I mean what SAP here trying to tell us? Thank you

entry.title: ABAP RAP - Behavior Projection and Implementation Class
entry.content:
Hi All,

I am building a sample app to learn RAP. I created a BO with two fields. This BO has @AccessControl.authorizationCheck: #CHECK annotation. This BO does not need any additional functionality hence after creating Behavior Definition, I thought I will skip creating behavior implemntation class and created service,

While testing the service, when I create a record, I get following error in the browser.

Runtime Error: 'RAISE_SHORTDUMP'. The OData request processing has been abnormally terminated. If you use SAP S/4HANA Cloud, please create an incident. Otherwise, if "Runtime Error" is not initial, launch ADT feed "Runtime Errors" or transaction ST22 / SM21 (system log analysis) for details and analysis.

In ADT, I can see following error(s)

Gateway error log - Backend Error: Metadata cache on hub system for current model is outdated

I also got another error, which I thought was not related to above.

The current program has intentionally triggered a termination with a short dump.

The dump analysis revealed "The exception is related to the previous exception "CX_RAP_HANDLER_NOT_IMPLEMENTED" that occurred in
program "CL_RAP_BHV_PROCESSOR==========CP", in line 30 of include "CL_RAP_BHV_PROCESSOR==========CM01G". The reason for this exception
was: Handler not implemented; Method: GLOBAL_AUTHORIZATION, Involved Entities: ZC_LV_CAT_9000"

While trying to figure out how to resolve cache issue, I decided to create the implementation class which would fix the error, The current program has intentionally triggered a termination with a short dump. however after creating the class, I did not write a single line of code and all the errors disappeared.

I am struggling to understand the relationship between the implemntation class and the other two errors. I'll appreciate any guidance in this context.

Regards

ASM

What is a binance futures referral code? - Binance Futures Referral Code is the code (D7YQPAYQ) that a new user can use when starting trading Futures in Binance Futures Platform.
